author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: RoleApp
description: Assigns security role GUIDs (JSON array) to a Model-Driven App module. Use after pp-app-model and pp-security-role to grant access.

SolutionRootPath.description: Relative path from the project folder (.csproj) to the folder containing unpacked Dataverse solution files (Other/, Entities/, OptionSets/). Use '.' if solution files are directly in the project folder, or a subfolder name like 'Declarations'. Do not use 'Entities' or 'Other' — those are subdirectories inside the solution metadata root.

AppLogicalName.description: Logical name of the app module to which security roles will be assigned

SecurityRolesIds.description: Id security roles witch shoud have an access to the app: [d00e8f31-33b6-4118-96ec-d7ae6620beac, fcc6ed39-88ea-447b-9290-7f34fb5c38db]

manualInstructions.text: Manually generate role privileges if the script fails
Manually add privileges to the security role if the script fails
